scripts.build: bun run sync:mcpb-assets && bun run sync:tree-sitter-assets && bun run patch:fumadocs-ui && next build
scripts.dev: sh -c 'bun run sync:mcpb-assets && bun run sync:tree-sitter-assets && bun run patch:fumadocs-ui && CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=true npx -y node@22 ./node_modules/next/dist/bin/next dev --port=${PORT:-${FUMADOCS_PORT:-4000}}'
scripts.start: sh -c 'bun run sync:mcpb-assets && bun run sync:tree-sitter-assets && bun run patch:fumadocs-ui && bun run api:bootstrap && next start --port=${PORT:-${FUMADOCS_PORT:-4000}}'
scripts.types:check: bun run sync:mcpb-assets && bun run sync:tree-sitter-assets && bun run patch:fumadocs-ui && fumadocs-mdx && next typegen && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.typecheck.json
scripts.postinstall: bun run sync:mcpb-assets && bun run sync:tree-sitter-assets && bun run patch:fumadocs-ui && fumadocs-mdx
scripts.api:bootstrap:index: bun run api:bootstrap && bun run api:index
